fixes.description: Revert Microaerobic to mild Oxygen perturbation: exogenous_supply=0.3 (Oxygen_Level=1.3). iter 2 fix (gm=0.3) made alg ratio jump to 9.97 at the bounded-inverse cap, over-predicting a strong increase when the paper reports unchanged.
fixes.reason: Oxygen_Level gm=0.3 crashes ROS (which has Oxygen_Level as sole activator), and the release of ROS's inhibition on Lycopene saturates at K=10. Keeping the exog=0.3 convention (Oxygen=1.3, mild) better fits the modest microaerobic effect reported in the literature.
fixes.biological_justification: Microaerobic growth does perturb oxygen-responsive regulators (ArcA, FNR) but the reported lycopene yield change in Ma 2020 is within noise — a mild Oxygen perturbation better matches this.

fixes.description: Remove the IPTG=0 part of T088 encoding. iter 2 fix crashed CRTE activation because IPTG is a CRTE activator in the network. Leave only CRTE OE (gm=2.0).
fixes.reason: The test probes a constitutive-promoter CrtE variant whose expression is IPTG-independent. The network, however, wires CRTE with IPTG as an activator; there is no way to represent 'constitutive CrtE that does not need IPTG' in the current framework. Removing IPTG=0 makes the test behave as plain CRTE OE (baseline IPTG present), which preserves the activation cascade. Framework limitation acknowledged for the IPTG-independence aspect.
fixes.biological_justification: P.agglomerans crtE under a constitutive promoter should increase lycopene regardless of IPTG. The model cannot represent IPTG-independence at the node level; removing IPTG=0 component is the closest the encoding can get to 'CrtE OE'.

fixes.description: Revise Xylose_carbon: keep Xylose at baseline gm=1.0 (no OE), set Glucose gm=0.0 (absent). iter 2 fix left Xylose=2 (doubled) which elevated G3P activation too far.
fixes.reason: A carbon-source switch is not an OE of the replacement carbon — it is simply Glucose absent, replacement present at normal activity. With Xylose at baseline 1.0 and Glucose at 0, total G3P activation has ONE activator at floor (Glucose=0.01) and the rest at 1, giving geometric-mean drop of ~50%.
fixes.biological_justification: Xylose as sole C source means all C entering via xylose catabolism at a single level, not doubled. Glucose absent, so Glucose activator of G3P drops.
